pr.title: Add non-record 10min submission: 11L XSA4 + EMA + GPTQ + FA3 (1.12336724)

output.summary: Stack pairs an 11-layer GQA with BigramHash/SmearGate mixing, late XSA+VE modules, and EMA plus late-QAT before FlashAttention/GPTQ int6 export.
techniques: 11L GQA with tied embeddings, BigramHash+SmearGate mixing, and VE/XSA on final layers
EMA plus late QAT trigger ahead of GPTQ int6 export compressed via zstd
Muon/Adam-style split optimizer with FlashAttention-3 on Hopper fallback to SDPA
